capabilities.name: Upload documents
capabilities.verify: manage_document + upload_document skillSeeds; DocumentsPage.tsx + AddDocumentDialog.tsx upload flow

capabilities.name: Folders/tags
capabilities.verify: Dual-surface DONE 2026-07-06. Skill: manage_document update with tags[] live over gateway (set ['contract','2026'] → updated). UI: DocumentTagsCell.tsx in DocumentsPage — tags shown as badges, add/remove inline via the existing document update path.
capabilities.notes: Tags now visible + editable in admin (was skill-only) 2026-07-06.

capabilities.name: Link to business records
capabilities.verify: related_entity_type/related_entity_id in manage_document skill; DocumentsPanel.tsx embeds per-entity docs, DocumentsPage shows 'Linked to' badge

capabilities.name: Version history
capabilities.verify: Document versions: document_versions (version_no unique per document_id; file_url, file_name, file_size_bytes, file_type, uploaded_by). useReplaceDocumentFile snapshots current file into document_versions then swaps the documents.file_url and increments documents.current_version_no. useRestoreDocumentVersion snapshots current then restores an older file pointer. UI: DocumentDetailSheet Versions card with upload + open + restore. LIVE VERIFIED 2026-07-08: version_no unique constraint honored; snapshot round-trip succeeded.

capabilities.name: Share links
capabilities.verify: Tokenized share links: document_share_links (unguessable token=gen_random_uuid(), permissions view|download, expires_at, revoked_at, access_count). Public edge function /document-share resolves token via SECURITY DEFINER resolve_document_share() — returns 410 when invalid/revoked/expired, otherwise 302 to a 5-minute signed storage URL (with Content-Disposition=attachment when permissions=download). UI: DocumentDetailSheet Shares card create/copy/revoke. LIVE VERIFIED 2026-07-08: edge function deployed, unknown-token returns 410 invalid_or_expired; resolver bumps access_count.

capabilities.name: E-sign request
capabilities.verify: Native e-sign request: document_signature_requests (single signer: signer_email, unguessable token, status draft/sent/signed/declined/expired, signature_data typed name or PNG data-URL, signature_type, ip/ua, expires_at). Public route /sign/document/:token → PublicDocumentSignPage (Type/Draw tabs, reuses SignaturePad). Anon RPCs: resolve_document_signature_request (token→request+doc), complete_document_signature (validates status/expiry, sanitizes drawn PNG ≤300k, stamps documents.signed_at). Edge function /document-sign-request routes the invite email through email-send. UI: DocumentDetailSheet Signatures card. LIVE VERIFIED 2026-07-08: complete_document_signature returned {ok:true, signed_at} and documents.signed_at was stamped.
